headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Enphase Energy (ENPH) After Its Sharp Multi Year Share Price Fall
summary: Some investors may be wondering if Enphase Energy at around US$32 is starting to look interesting again, or if the recent price puts it at risk of being a value trap. The stock closed at US$32.18, with returns of a 1.2% decline over 7 days, a 29.9% decline over 30 days, a 4.7% decline year to date, a 37.8% decline over 1 year, an 85.7% decline over 3 years and a 79.2% decline over 5 years, which can change how the market views both risk and potential reward.
